commands.command: vp create astro --no-interactive -- my-astro-app --yes --skip-houston --template basics # create Astro app
cd my-astro-app && vp install --ignore-scripts -- --no-frozen-lockfile # install dependencies

cd my-astro-app && perl -0pi.bak -e 's/
  lint: \{.*?
  \},
/
/s' vite.config.ts && vp check --fix # fix generated formatting and ensure no errors
